name: Sprint Automation
description: Automate create-story, dev-story, code-review, and optional final sprint review until the sprint is complete or a halt policy is triggered

name: Sprint Review
description: Generate a final sprint summary from sprint-status.yaml with completed work, unresolved items, and escalation points

name: Story Context Builder
description: Fresh-context worker that creates the next story artifact or a specified story artifact

name: Story Developer
description: Fresh-context worker that develops a single story and returns a structured result

name: Review Fixer
description: Fresh-context worker that reviews and auto-fixes a single story, then returns a structured result

name: Sprint Auditor
description: Fresh-context worker that writes the final sprint review report
